subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Khadijih Bagum
subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Verily a great tribulation and mighty calamity hath come upon Thee, one that hath caused the denizens of the Exalted Paradise and the dwellers of the Concourse on High
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان القلم ینوح و اللوح یبکی بما صعدت زفرات اهل الوفاء و نزلت عبرات الفردوس... ان یا قلم قد اتتک مصیبة کبری
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @visitation Tablets, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
